name: Jiangsu Gaoke Petrochemical Co., Ltd
summary: Jiangsu Gaoke Petrochemical Co., Ltd researches, develops, produces, and sells lubricants and greases in China and internationally. The company offers gasoline engine, diesel engine, construction machinery, industrial, transformer, vehicle gear, motorcycle, antifreeze, and auxiliary oils, as well as other lubricant products. Jiangsu Gaoke Petrochemical Co., Ltd is based in Yixing, China.
